statement: In every magma, Equation 1505 (`x = (y * x) * (z * (y * w))`) implies Equation 2294 (`x = (y * (x * (x * y))) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0984
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op z (op y w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x (op x y))) y)
